svg.title: VidyuthLabs Potentiostat System Block Diagram
svg.desc: Full system architecture showing AD5941 AFE, RA4M1 MCU, ESP32-S3, power tree, and electrode interface with signal directions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about USB-C power input design for this potentiostat')
sendPrompt('Explain the power regulation strategy for analog and digital rails')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the AD5941 electrochemical AFE and its configuration')
sendPrompt('What does the RA4M1 MCU handle in this system?')
sendPrompt('How does the ESP32-S3 communicate with the RA4M1?')
sendPrompt('Describe the PCB-integrated SPE electrode geometry and design')
sendPrompt('What are the microSD space and routing considerations?')
sendPrompt('What cloud or mobile endpoints does the ESP32 connect to?')

svg.text: Click any block to explore details
